scripts.infra: docker-compose up -d postgres redis zookeeper kafka
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix worker && npm install --prefix dashboard
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:dashboard" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold" -n "API,WORKER,DASH"
